nasb.text: But he forsook the counsel of the elders which they had given him, and consulted with the young men who grew up with him and served him.

esv.text: But he abandoned the counsel that the old men gave him, and took counsel with the young men who had grown up with him and stood before him.

cnv.text: 王不接受這些老人的意見，卻去和那些同他一起長大，侍立在他面前的年輕人商議，

ccb.text: 罗波安却没有采纳老臣的意见。他又去征询那些和他一起长大的青年臣僚的意见，
